output.code:
# Read the uploaded text file and extract all quoted substrings with their character offsets
path = "/mnt/data/file-CYTrGAejUKveyhADCJhKXX-text_to_analyse.txt"
with open(path, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
    text = f.read()

# Find all substrings between double quotes "
subs = []
start = 0
while True:
    i = text.find('\"', start)
    if i == -1:
        break
    j = text.find('\"', i+1)
    if j == -1:
        break
    subs.append((i, j, text[i+1:j]))
    start = j+1

len(text), len(subs), subs[:10]

targets = [
    "لا تجعلوا بيوتكم مقابر",
    "إن الشيطان ينفر من البيت الذي تقرأ فيه سورة البقرة",
    "وَعَلَى اللَّهِ فَتَوَكَّلُوا إِنْ كُنْتُمْ مُؤْمِنِينَ",
    "فاستقم كَمَآ أُمِرْتَ وَمَن تَابَ مَعَكَ وَلاَ تَطْغَوْاْ إِنَّهُ بِمَا تَعْمَلُونَ بَصِيرٌ",
    "فَكَيْفَ تَتَّقُونَ إِن كَفَرْتُمْ يَوْماً يَجْعَلُ الولدان شِيباً",
]
positions = {}
for t in targets:
    idx = text.find(t)
    positions[t] = idx
positions

start = text.find("لا تجعلوا بيوتكم مقابر")
end = start
# Extend to cover following part "، إن الشيطان ينفر من البيت الذي تقرأ فيه سورة البقرة."
# Find the next period after start
period = text.find(".", start)
snippet = text[start:period] if period != -1 else text[start:start+200]
start, period, snippet

text = open("/mnt/data/file-CYTrGAejUKveyhADCJhKXX-text_to_analyse.txt","r",encoding="utf-8").read()

spans = []

# Quoted ones already extracted earlier, but we'll re-add relevant ones.

# A: quoted 73:17 partial
spans.append({"start":124,"end":191,"text":text[124:191]})

# B: hadith quoted
spans.append({"start":265,"end":371,"text":text[265:371]})

# C: 30:54
spans.append({"start":461,"end":567,"text":text[461:567]})

# D: وجاءكم النذير
spans.append({"start":628,"end":642,"text":text[628:642]})

# E: Hadith sentence combined 1941..2015 (till before period)
spans.append({"start":1941,"end":2015,"text":text[1941:2015]})

# F: 5:23 phrase only
sF = text.find("وَعَلَى اللَّهِ فَتَوَكَّلُوا إِنْ كُنْتُمْ مُؤْمِنِينَ")
eF = sF + len("وَعَلَى اللَّهِ فَتَوَكَّلُوا إِنْ كُنْتُمْ مُؤْمِنِينَ")
spans.append({"start":sF,"end":eF,"text":text[sF:eF]})

# G: unquoted 73:17 with decorative bracket excluded 4208..4274
spans.append({"start":4208,"end":4274,"text":text[4208:4274]})

# H: hadith repeated quoted 4410..4516
spans.append({"start":4410,"end":4516,"text":text[4410:4516]})

# I: 11:112 unquoted 4574..4665
spans.append({"start":4574,"end":4665,"text":text[4574:4665]})

len(spans), spans

# recompute using earlier detection of quotes
path = "/mnt/data/file-CYTrGAejUKveyhADCJhKXX-text_to_analyse.txt"
text = open(path,'r',encoding='utf-8').read()
subs = []
start = 0
while True:
    i = text.find('\"', start)
    if i == -1:
        break
    j = text.find('\"', i+1)
    if j == -1:
        break
    subs.append((i, j, text[i+1:j]))
    start = j+1

quoted_spans = [{"start":i+1,"end":j,"text":text[i+1:j]} for (i,j,_) in subs]
quoted_spans

# Build the JSON as per schema
citations = []

def aya_entry(start, end, text, sura_name, sura_number, aya_number, corrected):
    return {
        "span_start": start,
        "span_end": end,
        "span_text": text,
        "citation_type": "Aya",
        "is_valid": False,
        "aya_reference": {
            "sura_name": sura_name,
            "sura_number": sura_number,
            "aya_number": aya_number
        },
        "hadeeth_reference": {},
        "corrected_text": corrected,
        "completely_invalid": False
    }

def hadith_entry(start, end, text):
    return {
        "span_start": start,
        "span_end": end,
        "span_text": text,
        "citation_type": "Hadeeth",
        "is_valid": False,
        "aya_reference": {},
        "hadeeth_reference": {},  # unknown
        "corrected_text": "خطأ",
        "completely_invalid": True
    }

# Prepare corrected texts (from memory)
correct_73_17 = "فَكَيْفَ تَتَّقُونَ إِن كَفَرْتُمْ يَوْمًا يَجْعَلُ الْوِلْدَانَ شِيبًا"
correct_30_54 = "اللَّهُ الَّذِي خَلَقَكُم مِّن ضَعْفٍ ثُمَّ جَعَلَ مِن بَعْدِ ضَعْفٍ قُوَّةً ثُمَّ جَعَلَ مِن بَعْدِ قُوَّةٍ ضَعْفًا وَشَيْبَةً ۚ يَخْلُقُ مَا يَشَاءُ ۖ وَهُوَ الْعَلِيمُ الْقَدِيرُ"
correct_35_37 = "أَوَلَمْ نُعَمِّرْكُم مَّا يَتَذَكَّرُ فِيهِ مَن تَذَكَّرَ وَجَاءَكُمُ النَّذِيرُ ۖ فَذُوقُوا فَمَا لِلظَّالِمِينَ مِن نَّصِيرٍ"
correct_5_23 = "قَالَ رَجُلَانِ مِنَ الَّذِينَ يَخَافُونَ أَنْعَمَ اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِمَا ادْخُلُوا عَلَيْهِمُ الْبَابَ فَإِذَا دَخَلْتُمُوهُ فَإِنَّكُمْ غَالِبُونَ وَعَلَى اللَّهِ فَتَوَكَّلُوا إِنْ كُنْتُمْ مُؤْمِنِينَ"
correct_11_112 = "فَاسْتَقِمْ كَمَا أُمِرْتَ وَمَن تَابَ مَعَكَ وَلَا تَطْغَوْا ۖ إِنَّهُ بِمَا تَعْمَلُونَ بَصِيرٌ"

# Build entries
citations.append(aya_entry(125,191,final_spans[0]["text"],"المزمل",73,17,correct_73_17))
citations.append(hadith_entry(266,371,final_spans[1]["text"]))
citations.append(aya_entry(462,567,final_spans[2]["text"],"الروم",30,54,correct_30_54))
citations.append(aya_entry(629,642,final_spans[3]["text"],"فاطر",35,37,correct_35_37))
citations.append(hadith_entry(1941,2015,final_spans[4]["text"]))
citations.append(aya_entry(2235,2290,final_spans[5]["text"],"المائدة",5,23,correct_5_23))
citations.append(aya_entry(4208,4274,final_spans[6]["text"],"المزمل",73,17,correct_73_17))
citations.append(hadith_entry(4411,4516,final_spans[7]["text"]))
citations.append(aya_entry(4574,4665,final_spans[8]["text"],"هود",11,112,correct_11_112))

result = {"citations": citations}
import json, textwrap
print(json.dumps(result, ensure_ascii=False)[:1000])

citations.description: List of citations with details, validation, references, and per-citation corrections.

span_start.description: Inclusive start character index of the citation within the text (exclude the qutation marks).

span_end.description: Exclusive end character index of the citation within the text (exclude the qutation marks).

span_text.description: The text content of the citation span.

citation_type.description: Type of the citation: either Aya (Quran) or Hadeeth (Prophetic tradition).

is_valid.description: True if the cited Aya or Hadeeth is recognized and valid, false otherwise.

aya_reference.description: Quranic reference details (required if citation_type is Aya; empty object if not applicable).

sura_name.description: Name of the sura (chapter) in the Quran.

sura_number.description: Number of the sura (chapter) in the Quran.

aya_number.description: Number of the aya (verse) in the Quran.

hadeeth_reference.description: Hadeeth reference details (required if citation_type is Hadeeth; empty object if not applicable).

collection_name.description: Name of the Hadeeth collection in english (e.g. Sahih Bukhari, Muslim).

hadith_number.description: Hadith number within the specified book.

corrected_text.description: The corrected version of the citation text (or the text itself if it was correct in the first place) (e.g. if there are certain words that were invalid this version must have this corrected), or 'خطأ' for completely invalid citations (i.e. no close enough citation can be found to correct the text). If there are close texts in Quran or Hadith - but too far from the citation, this must be considered 'خطأ' and completely_invalid must be true.

completely_invalid.description: Set to true if the citation is completely invalid i.e. there can't be a close enough text to correct it, (corrected_text must be 'خطأ').
